set-payload.value: #[{errorCode: 'INVALID_CUSTOMER_ID', errorMessage: 'Customer ID is required', timestamp: now() as String {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'}, requestId: vars.requestId}]
set-payload.doc:name: Set Error

set-payload.value: #[{errorCode: 'CUSTOMER_NOT_FOUND', errorMessage: 'Customer with ID ' ++ vars.customerId ++ ' not found', timestamp: now() as String {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'}, requestId: vars.requestId}]
set-payload.doc:name: Set Error

set-payload.value: #[{errorCode: 'INVALID_ORDER_ID', errorMessage: 'Order ID is required', timestamp: now() as String {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'}, requestId: vars.requestId}]
set-payload.doc:name: Set Error

set-payload.value: #[{errorCode: 'ORDER_NOT_FOUND', errorMessage: 'Order with ID ' ++ vars.orderId ++ ' not found', timestamp: now() as String {format: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'}, requestId: vars.requestId}]
set-payload.doc:name: Set Error
